daily.today_energy: Your cosmic vibe is magnetic today—the universe is basically handing you permission to take up space. Trust your gut, it's running on premium fuel right now. Whatever you've been sitting on, today's the day to move.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift, and honestly, it's giving main character. Whether you're coupled up or floating solo, lean into authenticity. Real connections happen when you stop performing and just exist.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Don't dim them down in meetings—your perspective is exactly what's needed. Channel this momentum into that project you've been hesitant about. The timing feels right.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Nothing intense needed—a walk, some stretching, dancing to your favorite song. Your nervous system wants grounding today, so honor that instinct and feel the shift.

weekly.overview: This week, you're radiating main character energy. Venus is dancing through your sector of joy, inviting you to lean into what actually makes you feel alive. Trust the pull toward adventure, even the small kind.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, this is a great time to get vulnerable about your actual needs. Single? You're giving off magnetic vibes—but the real magic is in knowing your own worth first. Quality over quantity always wins.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't hold back on sharing that project or perspective you've been sitting with. The universe is lowkey supporting your boldness, so let your authentic voice lead the way.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching, honor what energizes you. Rest isn't lazy—it's strategic. Listen to what your system actually needs.
